'''shathoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:caba|caba]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-th-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:caba|caba]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shathoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shætheseth|shætheseth]] || [[word:shæthesej|shæthesej]] || [[word:shæthesesh|shæthesesh]] || [[word:shæthese|shæthese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shathothosoth|shathothosoth]] || [[word:shathothosoj|shathothosoj]] || [[word:shathothososh|shathothososh]] || [[word:shathothoso|shathothoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shathosoth|shathosoth]] || [[word:shathosoj|shathosoj]] || [[word:shathososh|shathososh]] || [[word:shathoso|shathoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shathofsoth|shathofsoth]] || [[word:shathofsoj|shathofsoj]] || [[word:shathofsosh|shathofsosh]] || [[word:shathofsof|shathofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shathosotho|shathosotho]] || [[word:shathosojo|shathosojo]] || [[word:shathososho|shathososho]] || [[word:shathosoko|shathosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shathosoth|shathosoth]] || [[word:shathosoj|shathosoj]] || [[word:shathososh|shathososh]] || [[word:shathoso|shathoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shathosothol|shathosothol]] || [[word:shathosojol|shathosojol]] || [[word:shathososhol|shathososhol]] || [[word:shathosokol|shathosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shathosothotho|shathosothotho]] || [[word:shathosojojo|shathosojojo]] || [[word:shathososhosho|shathososhosho]] || [[word:shathosoko|shathosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shathosothon|shathosothon]] || [[word:shathosojon|shathosojon]] || [[word:shathososhon|shathososhon]] || [[word:shathosokon|shathosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shathosothoro|shathosothoro]] || [[word:shathosojoro|shathosojoro]] || [[word:shathososhoro|shathososhoro]] || [[word:shathosokoro|shathosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
